description: Skyscanner provides travel search and pricing services for flights, hotels, and car hire. Its partner platform supplies travel content and search capabilities that third parties can embed in their own websites, apps, and AI experiences.
summary: Skyscanner exposes a partner Travel REST API suite under `https://partners.api.skyscanner.net/apiservices/v3` authenticated by an `x-api-key`, plus a public MCP endpoint at `https://partners.api.skyscanner.net/b2b-mcp/mcp`.
